title: About Me
intro: I’m 21 years old and focused on continuing to grow in software development by building projects that help me gain real experience.
card1Text: I focus on fully understanding the problem before writing code, aiming for simple and scalable solutions.
card2Text: I learn by building real projects, making mistakes, and continuously improving how I develop.
card3Text: I aim to grow long-term as a developer, prioritizing good practices and maintainable code.
p1: I’m especially interested in understanding how an application works beyond the interface: from endpoint design and business rules to code organization and database integration.
p2: I enjoy working on projects where I can apply good practices, write maintainable code, and improve both technically and in solving real problems.
p3: I’m currently studying software development at UTN Rosario and complement that learning by building personal projects to continue strengthening my full stack profile.
sideText1: Studying software development and building personal projects.
sideText2: To land my first professional opportunity and keep evolving as a developer.
